title: Uragoga reticulata
taxonomy: Uragoga reticulata is a species of plant in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Uragoga, which is a group of flowering plants. Uragoga reticulata is native to tropical Africa, where it can be found growing in various habitats. The classification of Uragoga reticulata places it within the kingdom Plantae. Further classification includes its order Lamiales.
